name: Rabbit Skater Game
description: Get ready for an exciting and fast-paced adventure in Rabbit Skater Game! Jump into a fun-filled world where a cute and energetic rabbit rides a skateboard through challenging tracks, avoiding obstacles and collecting rewards. This addictive endless runner game combines smooth controls, colorful environments, and thrilling gameplay to keep players engaged for hours.
instructions: A for Jump D for Move - To click any button use mouse
